issues.message: Gemini did not return a usable production intent.

actual.error: intent lost or altered explicit millimeter values from the user request: [85.0, 70.0, 48.0, 35.0]; intent moved or altered source measurements bound to route_rise: [85.0, 35.0]; escape_stage relative first waypoint is too close/off-axis for a regular tangent entry: its circular-entry radius is 1.27043 mm but at least 18 mm is required. Move the first anchor farther along the incoming tangent before turning; escape_stage direct required-anchor realization predicts a minimum curvature radius of 0.0916168 mm but at least 18 mm is required after deterministic handle optimization (factors [0.4, 0.55, 0.55, 0.4]). Redistribute or add well-separated relative anchors so each direction change is spread over more distance

next_actions: Fix INTENT_EXTRACTION_FAILED: Gemini did not return a usable production intent.
